ul.li: Alignment: Snapshot chunks MUST be written at 4096-byte boundaries to facilitate high-speed O_DIRECT access.
Integrity: Each snapshot chunk should include a CRC32C checksum to verify data integrity before restoration.
Dummy Entry: The log at index lastIncludedIndex is replaced by a placeholder entry with the correct term to support prevLogTerm checks for future AppendEntries.
Concurrency: The RestoreSnapshot call must acquire a Write Lock on the State Machine, blocking all client read/write operations during the reload.
If SaveSnapshot fails, the follower must return success: false or timeout; the leader must retry from the last successful offset.
